cms.task_text: Bloky pro kreslení kříže jsou rozhozeny. [hlp]Sestavte správný kříž[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="22" y="26"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" x="180" y="26"></block><block type="turtle_backward" x="22" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" x="180" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" x="22" y="210"></block><block type="turtle_forward" x="180" y="210"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_backward" x="22" y="300"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_backward"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
